positive: A stylized, whimsical scene of a glowing crescent moon over a calm cosmic forest. The forest consists of bioluminescent, oversized flora with geometric patterns and subtle gradient color shifts (deep indigo, cyan, and soft teal). Silhouettes of gentle, mythical creatures (like stylized deer or winged foxes) hop among the glowing roots. The composition should be perfectly centered, with the moon dominating the upper third. Use a crisp, graphic art style reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets celestial cartography. Strong backlighting and deep contrast are key. Highly suitable for repeating, single-color print on apparel. Flat vector graphic quality, clean lines, high saturation, zero gradients in the final print areas, minimalist details.
negative: blurry, grainy, photorealism, text, watermark, logo, writing, low detail, messy, asymmetrical, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, out-of-focus, complex shadows, gradients
